methodology: Derived from customer KPI pyramids, 1-year product strategy horizons, and delivery activity using an OKR-inspired structure.

goals.title: 2026-Q1 Make employer bike-program launches repeatable
goals.objective: Reduce employer rollout friction so new programs go live faster, convert more eligible employees into riders, and create a stronger renewal case within the first quarter.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Share of eligible employees who activate and keep using a company bike program.
Time from contract signature to employee enrollment readiness.

linkedBusinessKPIs.kpiName: Net revenue retention from employer programs
linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Revenue retention and expansion across employer accounts after churn, contraction, and expansion.

keyResults.target: Cut launch time for newly signed employers
keyResults.baseline: Current rollout duration varies by market and integration complexity
keyResults.statement: Reduce the time from employer signature to enrollment-ready launch by standardizing policy setup and payroll onboarding.

keyResults.target: Lift first-wave participation in newly launched employers
keyResults.baseline: Adoption depends heavily on launch quality and local communications
keyResults.statement: Increase adoption among eligible employees by making enrollment and bike selection easier in the first 90 days after launch.

keyResults.metric: Net revenue retention from employer programs
keyResults.target: Strengthen renewal and expansion economics in the active employer base
keyResults.baseline: Retention varies by service quality, adoption, and country maturity
keyResults.statement: Increase employer revenue retention by reducing operational friction and creating a clearer expansion path into additional countries and employee groups.

linkedInitiatives.description: Employer launch acceleration initiative focused on improving employer policy & program management, eligibility, payroll & HRIS sync, and settlement, invoicing & payroll reconciliation to make multi-country employer rollouts faster and less manual across Employer Admin Portal, Employer Integration API, and Employer KPI Cockpit.

linkedReleases.description: Release of employer rollout improvements covering employer policy & program management, eligibility, payroll & HRIS sync, and settlement, invoicing & payroll reconciliation across Employer Admin Portal, Employer Integration API, and Employer KPI Cockpit.

goals.title: 2026-Q1 Turn interested employees into confident active riders
goals.objective: Improve the rider journey from quote to daily commuting by making affordability clearer, order progress more transparent, and service recovery faster when problems happen.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Share of riders who convert from configured quote to confirmed order.
Average time to restore rider mobility after a reported issue.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Count of riders with a live contract and recent activity.

keyResults.target: Convert more configured riders into confirmed orders
keyResults.baseline: Conversion drops when savings are unclear or order steps feel opaque
keyResults.statement: Increase quote-to-order conversion by clarifying monthly cost, expected savings, and dealer handover expectations before commitment.

keyResults.target: Restore rider mobility faster after theft, damage, or breakdown
keyResults.baseline: Recovery speed varies by partner responsiveness and case complexity
keyResults.statement: Reduce incident recovery time by giving riders better status visibility and faster routing into service and claims workflows.

keyResults.target: Grow the number of riders who stay active after onboarding
keyResults.baseline: Activation and early churn differ across employers and markets
keyResults.statement: Increase active riders by improving both onboarding conversion and the first-service experience after the bike is delivered.

linkedInitiatives.description: Rider conversion and trust initiative focused on improving bike catalog & recommendation, order orchestration & checkout, rider identity, wallet & app experience, and communications & notifications across iOS App, Android App, Rider Web Experience, and Lifecycle Notifications.

Partner service control tower initiative focused on improving dealer & service partner network management, stock, availability & handover planning, service case & maintenance orchestration, and insurance & claims administration across Partner Portal and Partner Integration API.

linkedReleases.description: Release of rider conversion and transparency improvements covering bike catalog & recommendation, order orchestration & checkout, rider identity, wallet & app experience, and communications & notifications across iOS App, Android App, Rider Web Experience, and Lifecycle Notifications.

Release of partner service workflow improvements covering dealer & service partner network management, stock, availability & handover planning, service case & maintenance orchestration, and insurance & claims administration across Partner Portal and Partner Integration API.
